bullets: Built an end-to-end commercial pipeline for VLA navigation models (1B–7B), covering large-scale data collection (500+ hours), training, and on-device inference optimization.
Designed and operated a multi-container deployment architecture (Isaac Sim + ROS2 Jazzy + GPU inference) for Sim-to-Real transfer across 6+ real-world field sites.
Enhanced policy robustness via domain randomization and efficient human intervention pipelines, enabling production-level autonomous navigation.
Led open-source initiatives by releasing benchmarks (CostNav), datasets, and simulation tools to accelerate robot learning research.
Led the ideation and fundamental research for commonsense-aware navigation system CANVAS, accepted to ICRA 2025.
Designed comprehensive evaluation protocols spanning NVIDIA Isaac Sim and real-world environments.
Developed the foundational data pipeline for large-scale teleoperation collection and model training.
Developed the overall Drug Target Interaction (DTI) model architecture and conducted data crawling and processing.
Created a fine-tuning framework and provided services to an international big pharma corporation.
Developed a reinforcement learning model to enhance pocket-conditioned 3D molecule generation model.
